name: St. Patrick Day Treat
recipeIngredient: 1 Pkg (20 Oz) Refrigerated Peanut Butter Cookie Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cookie dough into 3/4-inch slices.
2. Cut each slice into quarters.
3. Roll the dough into balls and place them in an ungreased miniature muffin pan (1 3/4-inch).
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes.
5. Remove the cookies from the oven and press the center of each cookie down with a tart tamper or the end of a wooden spoon handle to form a tart shell.
6. Return the cookies to the oven and bake at 350 degrees for an additional 8 to 10 minutes. Do not overbake.
7. Carefully loosen the outer edge of the tart shells with a small knife.
8. Let cool completely.
9. Remove the shells from the pan and place them on a cake rack until ready to serve.
10. Fill the shells with mint green ice cream just before serving.
